title: Röda börser, AI-våg och Tången
summary_md:
# Röda börser, AI-våg och Tången

**Feed**: efn-borsfrukost  
**Published**: 2026-06-05  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode centers on renewed AI jitters dragging Asian markets and the Stockholm exchange lower, set against a wave of IPOs (SpaceX, Tången, Nortech) signalling a re-opening IPO window. A live interview with Tången CEO Nina Bergman explores serial-acquirer strategy, culture-building and disciplined valuation ahead of its listing, while hosts contrast Tången's simple cash-flow-focused model with SpaceX's complex, hard-to-value space-datacenter ambitions. Macro focus turns to US non-farm payrolls and inflation risk from the Strait of Hormuz.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SINCH — Sinch | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Nordea upgraded Sinch from hold to buy, producing a positive imprint on the share price.

#### Reasoning

Cited analyst (Nordea) upgrade from hold to buy. Hosts note the upgrade gave a positive price reaction but offer no independent thesis, so conviction is moderate and driven by the broker call rather than host opinion.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Nordea reverses the rating
- if next quarterly results disappoint

> *"Och så ser vi att Nordea höjer Synch från behåll till köp. Det här ger också positiva avtryck i kurserna."*

---

### 🟢 SAVE — Nordnet | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Berenberg raised the online broker Nordnet to buy.

#### Reasoning

Cited analyst (Berenberg) upgrade to buy on the online broker. Reported as a positive rating change feeding through to share prices; no independent host thesis, so conviction is moderate.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the analyst downgrades
- if trading volumes/retail activity weaken

> *"Berger gör motsvarande för nätmäklaren Nordnet."*

---

### 🟢 SEB-A — SEB | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

DNB raised the big bank to buy.

#### Reasoning

Cited analyst (DNB) upgrade of the major bank to buy. Mentioned in a rundown of rating changes producing positive price reactions; analyst-driven rather than host conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if DNB reverses the rating
- if net interest income outlook deteriorates

> *"Storbanken SCB höjs till köp från DNB."*

---

### 🟡 SECT-B — Sectra | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Solid Q4 (509m op result, 20.2% margin) though orders -46.5% vs a record year; hosts see steady development and AI tailwinds.

#### Reasoning

Hosts are largely neutral ('jag tänker nog inte så jättemycket'), viewing Sectra as developing well with the stock ticking along and likely AI-driven benefits to its business. The order drop is contextualised by a prior record order. No strong directional conviction — a hold/watch stance.

#### Sell Triggers

- if order intake keeps falling beyond the record-year comparison
- if margins compress
- if AI fails to support the business

> *"Det är ett bolag som verkar utvecklas ganska väl. Sett till kursen så rullar det på."*

---
